name: ai-engineering
description: 23 engineering skills across 3 tiers (Engineering, Security & Operations, Intelligence) for AI IDEs. Includes code-review, architecture-review, security-review, threat-model, rag-review, document-extraction, hallucination-audit, task-decomposition, and more. Every skill follows a shared contract (machine_output + skill graph), works standalone, and gets supercharged when you connect your tools (see CONNECTORS.md and SKILL-CONTRACT.md).
